name: German Shensel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Add the grated lemon rind and mix thoroughly.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg lightly and add enough milk to make half a cup of liquid. Stir in the almond extract.
4. Pour the wet mixture over the dry ingredients and stir with a fork until a soft dough forms. If needed, add a few drops of milk to achieve the desired consistency.
5. Place the dough in an unbuttered 9x13 inch baking pan. Use your fingers to pat the dough evenly to cover the bottom and about halfway up the sides of the pan.
6. Refrigerate the dough while preparing the apples.
7. Arrange the sliced apples over the dough in even, slightly overlapping rows.
8. Spread the Shengsel topping evenly over the apples.
9. Bake in a 375°F (190°C) oven for 30-40 minutes.
10. Cut into squares and serve with whipped cream. Serves 10-12.
